ingredients: 0.5 kg potatoes, 1.25 cup onions, 1 cup tomatoes, 12 cashew nuts, 2.5 tablespoon oil, 1 green chilli, 1 teaspoon ginger garlic paste, 0.75 teaspoon salt, 0.875 teaspoon sugar, 0.25 cup curd, 1 tablespoon coriander leaves, 1 bay leaf, 2 green cardamom, 1 teaspoon garam masala, 1 teaspoon coriander powder, 0.875 teaspoon kashmiri red chilli powder, 0.25 teaspoon turmeric powder, 0.25 teaspoon fennel seeds powder, 1 teaspoon kasuri methi
instructions: 1. I have used 450 to 500 grams baby potatoes, but you can also use large potatoes. Wash, peel & cube them to 1½ inch. If using uneven sized baby potatoes, cut the large size ones to make all of them the same size. This way they cook evenly. 2. Bring 3 to 4 cups water to a boil in a pot. Then add the potatoes and boil them till half cooked. To check, prick the potato with a fork. You should feel it hard but not very hard. Remove them from water and cool completely. Also ensure there is no water over them. 3. This step is optional but the texture of potatoes fried in oil is very nice. Pour 3 tablespoons oil to a wide non-stick and heat it. Add the potatoes and fry them on a medium high heat until golden. 4. I drained off the oil after 2 minutes and pan roasted them until golden. I do this just to avoid heating oil for a long time. You may do the same. Set these aside. Prick each of them with a fork in 2 to 3 spots, so the potatoes absorb some flavors. 5. Boil 1¼ cup onions (230 grams) in 2 cups water until transparent for about 6 to 8 mins. This step helps to remove the pungent smell and bitter taste from the onions. Drain them & rinse well. Add the cooled onions, 1 cup tomatoes (180 grams) and 12 cashews (24 split) to a blender jar. 6. Make a smooth paste. If your blender is not strong enough then filter the puree otherwise the gravy will not be smooth enough. 7. Boil 250 grams potatoes until slightly tender but undercooked. 8. Drain them to a colander and prick each potato a few times (2 to 3) with a fork. Let them cool and air dry for a while. Meanwhile blend the yogurt with cashews to a smooth puree. If using almonds, soak them in hot water for 4 to 5 hours, peel and use. 9. Pour 3 tbsps oil to a small pan and add the potatoes. Fry them until blistered or light golden. Remove and set them aside. 10. Pour 2 tbsps oil to a hot pot or pan. If you want you can use the same oil in which you fried the potatoes. Regulate the flame to low and add bay leaf and half tsp shahi jeera or cumin seeds. As soon as the seeds begin to splutter, add 2 pinches of hing and half tsp fennel seeds powder. 11. Stir and add 1 teaspoon ginger paste. Saute until aromatic. 12. Add 200 grams tomatoes, half teaspoon salt and half cup green peas (optional). Saute until the tomatoes turn mushy and soft. 13. Next add red chilli powder, garam masala and coriander powder. Saute until the masala smells good and begins to separate the oils. 14. Then add the potatoes. 15. Add the ground yogurt cashew paste. Stir and cook for a few minutes until bubbling. Pour ¾ cup water. Bring it to a gentle boil. 16. Cover with a tight lid or foil. Simmer completely and dum cook for 5 to 7 minutes until the potatoes are completely tender and the gravy becomes thick. 17. Taste test and adjust the spices and salt if required. Add coriander leaves and serve dum aloo with roti, poori or with basmati rice. 18. Wash and peel potatoes. If using large potatoes, then cube them to equal size about 1½ inch each. If using baby potatoes make sure all are of the same size. 19. Bring 3 to 4 cups of water to a rolling boil in a pot. Then add the potatoes. Boil them until they are half cooked. To check, prick them with a fork, you will feel them hard but not very hard. Remove them from water with a slotted spoon. Set aside to cool & dry. 20. This step is optional but gives a good texture to the potatoes . Heat 3 tablespoons of oil in a non-stick pan. Add the potatoes and shallow fry them on a medium high flame until golden. Remove them to a plate. 21. Bring 2 cups of water to a boil and add onions to it. Boil for 6 to 8 minutes until they turn pale and transparent. Drain them completely & rinse with cold water. Drain again. 22. Add them to a blender jar along with cashews and tomatoes. Make a smooth puree. If you do not have a powerful blender, then filter the puree. Keep this aside. 23. Heat a pan with 2 tablespoons oil. Add bay leaf and cardamom. Then add ginger garlic paste & fry until the raw smell goes away. 24. Add the onion tomato paste and saute until the raw smell goes away and the paste thickens slightly. 25. Next add chili powder, garam masala, coriander powder, salt, fennel seeds powder, sugar and turmeric. 26. Saute until the masala becomes thick, smells good and aromatic. (check step-by-step photos above) 27. Meanwhile, whisk yogurt in a small bowl until smooth. Then add 2 tablespoons of the onion tomato masala to the whisked yogurt. Mix it well and add back to the pan. 28. Saute until the masala turns thicker. Add potatoes and pour ½ cup water. Stir well to make a gravy. If needed add more water as required. Bring the gravy to a boil. 29. Cover with a tight lid or foil. Dum cook on a low heat for 5 to 7 minutes. At this stage the gravy must be thick and potatoes fully cooked. 30. Sprinkle crushed kasuri methi. Taste test and add more salt if needed. Turn off. 31. Lastly sprinkle coriander leaves and transfer dum aloo to a serving bowl. Keep covered until dum aloo is served. 32. Serve it with basmati rice, roti, butter naan or even with flavored rice like jeera rice, ghee rice or pulao. 33. Bring 1 ½ cups water to a rolling boil in a small pot. Add the cubed onions and boil them for 6 to 8 mins, until transparent. Drain them completely and rinse with cold water. Drain again. 34. Add these to a blender jar along with tomatoes & cashews. Blend to a smooth puree. 35. Press the SAUTE button on the Instant pot and pour oil to the steel insert. 36. Add bay leaf and green cardamoms to the hot oil. Followed by ginger garlic paste. 37. Saute for 30 to 60 seconds until the raw smell goes away. 38. Then add the onion tomato paste, red chilli powder, garam masala, coriander powder, salt, sugar and fennel powder. 39. Saute for 3 to 4 until the mixture turns slightly thicker. 40. While this is done, whisk yogurt in a small bowl until smooth. Take 2 tablespoons of the onion tomato masala to the yogurt and mix it well. Pour it back to the pot. 41. Mix everything well and saute for another 3 to 4 minutes. The mixture turns very aromatic and you will get the caramelized smell. The raw smell of tomatoes has to go away by then. Do not burn. Press CANCEL button. 42. Pour 1 ¾ cups water and deglaze the pot with a wooden spatula to release the bits of masala stuck at the bottom. Do not skip this step. 43. Drain the water from diced potatoes and add them here. Taste test the gravy and add more salt if needed. 44. Secure the Instant pot with the lid and position the steam release value to sealing. Press PRESSURE COOK button and set the timer to 4 minutes. 45. The IP beeps when it is done. Wait for 6 to 7 minutes and then release the pressure manually by gently moving the steam release handle to venting. 46. You see the dum aloo gravy is almost thick yet slightly runny. The potatoes also will be perfectly done. Crush kasuri methi and add it. 47. Press SAUTE button and let it cook for 30 to 60 seconds. The gravy will thicken further after cooling. 48. Garnish with coriander leaves and serve with naan or plain basmati rice.

title: Dum ka Chicken
ingredients: 1 kg bone-in chicken, 3 cups red onions, 0.3333333333333333 cup ghee, 2.5 teaspoons Kashmiri red chili powder, 0.5 teaspoon turmeric, 1.25 teaspoon garam masala, 1 tablespoon coriander powder, 0.5 teaspoon cumin powder, 1.5 teaspoon sea salt, 1 cup yogurt, 2 tablespoons lemon juice, 0.75 tablespoon garlic paste, 0.75 tablespoon ginger paste, 3 green chilies slit, 0.25 cup pudina mint leaves, 0.25 cup coriander leaves, 0.625 teaspoon shahi jeera, 8 green cardamoms, 4 cloves 4 cloves, 2 inch cinnamon piece, 1 star anise, 0.25 cup almonds, 2 tablespoons shredded coconut, 0.25 cup milk
instructions: 1. Heat ghee in a wide pot. Fry the onions on a medium heat, stirring constantly for 12 to 13 mins, until golden & caramelized but not burnt. You may also fry them in 2 batches, each for 9 to 10 mins. 2. Turn off and reserve 2 tablespoons each - ghee and fried onions aside, retaining the rest in the pot. Add all the whole spices - shahi jeera, cardamoms, cloves, cinnamon, star anise to the hot pan. Cool down the pot. 3. Meanwhile, prep up the other ingredients and blend drained soaked nuts, coconut and half of the cardamoms with milk/water to a smooth or slightly coarse paste. 4. Add chili powder, turmeric, garam masala, coriander powder, cumin powder, salt, ginger garlic paste, green chili, yogurt, lemon juice, mint, coriander leaves and the nut paste. 5. Mix well & taste test the marinade to adjust salt & spice levels. Add the chicken and marinate for 30 mins. Turn on the stove and saute marinated chicken on a medium high heat for 7 to 8 mins. Pour ½ cup hot water and mix well. 6. Turn down the heat to low. Cover with a foil and a heavy lid. Cook on a very low heat for 25 mins. Mix well and cook for another 20 mins. 7. Layer the reserved fried onions and ghee. Cover back and raise the heat to medium and cook for 5 mins. 8. Let rest for another 30 mins, before opening. Garnish with coriander leaves. Serve dum ka chicken with tandoori roti, kulcha, plain paratha, naan or with bagara rice, saffron rice or turmeric rice.

title: Egg Bhurji Recipe (Indian Anda Bhurji)
ingredients: 4 eggs, 0.25 teaspoon salt, 2 tablespoons oil, 0.5 teaspoon cumin seeds, 0.625 cup onion, 1 green chili, 0.875 teaspoon ginger garlic paste, 0.875 teaspoon garam masala, 0.625 teaspoon red chili powder, 0.125 teaspoon turmeric, 2 tablespoons coriander leaves, 1 tomato, 0.25 cup bell pepper
instructions: 1. Break 4 regular sized eggs (or 2 to 3 jumbo eggs) to a bowl. Add ⅛ teaspoon turmeric and ¼ teaspoon salt. (you can adjust the number of eggs to your preference) 2. Beat the eggs till frothy. Set this aside. This step is optional and you can add eggs without beating to the pan as well. But the fluffy texture would be missing. Some people also add few tbsps of milk to yield a fluffy scrambled egg. 3. Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a pan. Add ½ teaspoon cumin seeds. When they begin to splutter, add curry leaves (optional). Saute till the leaves turn crisp. 4. Add ½ to ¾ cup finely chopped onion and 1 green chili. 5. Saute until the onions turn golden. Add ¾ to 1 teaspoon ginger garlic paste. Saute well until the raw smell of the ginger and garlic goes away. 6. This step is optional, If you don’t like to use tomatoes, just skip them or use capsicum. Add 1 finely chopped tomato and saute well. 7. The tomatoes should break down well and blend well with onions. You can also add ½ to ¾ teaspoon red chilli powder and ¾ to 1 teaspoon garam masla at this stage. Fry till the masala begins to smell good. But I have added the spice powders later. 8. Pour the beaten eggs. You can also straight away add the eggs without beating. 9. Scramble the eggs & cook until almost done. Add garam masala and chili powder. Stir and fry until the raw smell of the chilli powder has gone completely. Also do not overcook as the eggs loose the softness. 10. Taste test and add more salt if needed. Cook until just done. Garnish with coriander leaves. You can also squeeze some lemon juice. Serve egg bhurji with pav, bread, roti or rice.

title: Egg biryani
ingredients: 3 tablespoon ghee, 2 cups basmati rice, 1 tablespoon Ginger garlic paste, 1 cup onion, 1.5 green chilies, 4.5 boiled eggs, 1 medium tomato, 0.25 teaspoon turmeric, 1 teaspoon red chili powder, 1 tablespoon garam masala, 0.25 cup mint, 1 teaspoon Salt, 6 tablespoons curd, 3.75 to 4 cups water, 2.5 cups water, 3.5 cups water, 1 star anise, 1 bay leaf, 0.5 teaspoon cumin, 4 green cardamoms, 4 cloves 4 cloves (laung), 1 inch cinnamon, 1 strand mace
instructions: 1. Soak rice for at least 20 to 30 mins. Drain water and set the rice aside in a colander. 2. Boil eggs and remove the shells and rinse them. Make few gashes using a knife or a fork. Set aside. 3. Heat a pressure cooker or a pot with oil. 4. Add star anise, bay leaf, shahi jeera, cardamoms, cloves, cinnamon and mace. Allow them to sizzle. 5. Next add onions and green chilies. Fry/saute till golden or light brown. 6. Add ginger garlic paste. Fry till the raw smell goes off. 7. Add tomatoes, mint, red chili powder, turmeric, salt and yogurt. Cook until the tomatoes turn mushy. 8. Add eggs, potatoes (if using) and biryani masala powder. Fry till the mixture thickens. 9. Pour water and add salt as needed. Taste to check for salt and spice levels. 10. Bring it to a boil & add drained rice. 11. If cooking in pot lower the flame completely, cover and cook till the rice is done fully. If the rice seems to be uncooked, then pour few tablespoons of hot water. If using pressure cooker, close the lid and cook for 1 whistle. Set this aside, don’t leave on the hot burner. 12. Fluff up the egg biryani and serve with raita. 13. Press SAUTE button on the Instant pot. Pour ghee to the inner pot of the IP. 14. When the ghee melts add the onions. Spread them in the oil & saute occasionally until deep golden. 15. Remove half of the onions and set aside for garnish. 16. Add the whole spices to the pot and stir. 17. Next add ginger garlic & chilli. Saute for 30 to 60 seconds. 18. Then add tomatoes and sprinkle salt. Saute until the tomatoes turn mushy. 19. Stir in the spice powders – chilli powder, turmeric and biryani masala. 20. Then add the yogurt and deglaze the pot by scrubbing the bottom with a spatula. This releases any bits of food stuck there and avoids burn notice. 21. Press CANCEL button when the mixture turns thick in a minute or so. 22. Then make incisions on the eggs and stir them with the spicy masala. 23. Layer the rice evenly in the pot. 24. Pour 2 cups water around the edges and half cup on top. 25. Ensure the rice is under the water. (Check the video below.) 26. Add some mint leaves and saffron soaked in 1 tbsp milk (optional). Taste the water and add more salt if needed. 27. Secure the Instant pot with the lid & position the steam release handle to sealing. 28. Press PRESSURE COOK button (high pressure) & set the timer to 5 mins. 29. When the Instant pot beeps wait for 6 to 7 mins. Then release rest of the pressure manually. 30. Do not stir the egg biryani a lot. Serve it gently with a spatula. 31. Whisk 1 cup yogurt with salt. Add 1 sliced onion, green chilli & 2 tbsps coriander leaves. Mix well and serve.

title: Egg Butter Masala
ingredients: 3.5 hard boiled eggs, 2 tbsp butter, 0.75 cup onions, 1 cup tomatoes, 3 medium garlic cloves, 0.5 inch ginger, 1 cashew nuts, salt, 0.75 tsp red chili powder, turmeric, 2 cloves 2 cloves, 2 cardamoms, 1 stick cinnamon, 0.625 tsp garam masala, 0.5 tsp coriander powder, 0.25 tsp kasuri methi
instructions: 1. Heat 1 tablespoon butter in a pan. I suggest not to substitute butter with oil. Eggs roasted in butter taste and smell very good. 2. Prick boiled eggs with fork few times. Roast them until golden. Set these aside 3. To the same pan, add onions, tomatoes, ginger, garlic, cashews and salt. Saute on a high to medium flame until tomatoes turn soft and mushy. If needed cover and cook. Do not saute on a low flame. 4. Add chili powder and turmeric. 5. Saute until the raw smell of the chili powder has gone. 6. Cool and add to a blender jar with ¾ cup water. 7. Blend to a smooth puree. 8. Add another 1 tbsp butter. Optionally add a small cinnamon piece, cloves and cardamom. 9. Pour the onion tomato puree. Add more water as needed to bring it to a consistency. I used ¼ cup water. 10. Cover and cook. 11. When the gravy turns thick, add garam masala and coriander powder. Cook further for a while. 12. It is done when traces of fat are visible on the gravy. Sprinkle kasuri methi. 13. Add eggs, juliennes of ginger and lower the flame. Taste test and adjust salt. Cook covered for about 2 to 3 mins. If you like you can also add cream. Garnish with coriander leaves.

title: Egg Dosa
ingredients: 2 eggs, 1 cup dosa batter, 1 onion, 2 green chilies, 2 tablespoons coriander leaves, 2.5 tablespoons carrot, salt, 1.5 tablespoons oil, 1.5 tablespoons chutney
instructions: 1. Get the ingredients ready. You need batter close to room temperature (cold is alright), 1 egg per dosa and few chopped onions, grated carrots (optional), green chili and coriander leaves. If you like to make the street style egg dosa, you will also need some chunky curry/ chutney/ sauce /gravy. 2. Grease a tawa and heat it on a medium flame until hot enough. Pour one full ladle of batter in the center and spread it. Do not make a very thin dosa. I prefer to keep the edges thick to prevent the egg flowing out of the dosa. Cook until the batter gets cooked for about 2 mins. Add a tbsp of thick curry, chutney or sauce as per your preference to the center of the dosa. I do not use. 3. Pour the egg in the center . I prefer to break the egg to a bowl first to make sure no shells fall into it. 4. Break the yolk with a spoon and spread it evenly around the dosa. 5. Add veggies. 6. Pour 1 teaspoon oil around the edges and another spoon all over the toppings. Use generous amount of oil to cook the egg else it won’t smell good. 7. When the base is firm, turn it to the other side and press down with a wooden spatula. Cook on a medium heat until the egg is fully cooked through. Avoid cooking on low heat, egg turns harder. Cooking on very high heat only burns the eggs without cooking well. 8. Turn it to the other side and cook it until the dosa turns crispy. Serve Egg Dosa hot with or without a chutney.

title: Egg Fried Noodles Recipe
ingredients: 2 cakes noodles, 3.5 eggs, 2 tablespoons peanut oil, 1.25 tablespoon garlic cloves, 2.5 green chilies, 0.5 teaspoon black pepper, 1 teaspoon rice vinegar, 1 tablespoon soya sauce, 1 tablespoon red chilli sauce, 1 onion, 0.5 cup bell peppers, 1 carrot, 5 French beans
instructions: 1. Bring 8 to 10 cups of water to a rolling boil in a large pot. Add the noodles and let cook al dente, meaning fully cooked but the noodles should have a bite to them. Follow the cook time from your pack of noodles. Mine takes about 3 mins. 2. Drain the noodles to a colander. I rinse mine under cold running water following the manufacturers instructions. 3. While the noodles cook, rinse and chop the veggies. Separate the greens and the whites from the green onions while you chop. 4. Break the eggs in a rinsed bowl & scramble them with a fork until frothy. Set aside. 5. Heat a wok with oil. When the oil is hot enough, add the chopped garlic and the spring onion whites. Let fry for 30 seconds. 6. Add carrots, bell peppers and green beans. Fry them on a high heat until slightly tender yet crunchy. 7. Slide the veggies aside in the wok and reduce the heat. Pour the eggs. Scramble them and cook till done but not overcooked. 8. Sprinkle salt and pepper. Pour the sauces and vinegar. Add the cooked noodles. 9. Stir fry the noodles just for a minute or so on the highest heat. Sprinkle pepper. 10. Serve egg fried noodles while still hot.

title: Egg Fried Rice Recipe
ingredients: 3 cups cooked rice, 1.25 tablespoon soya sauce, 1.5 teaspoon rice vinegar, 1 tablespoon garlic, 1 green chili, 0.25 teaspoon crushed black pepper, 0.25 teaspoon salt, 2 tablespoons oil, 3.5 stalks spring onions, 3 eggs, 1.25 tablespoons schezwan sauce, 0.5 cup carrot, 0.5 cup bell peppers, 0.5 cup cabbage
instructions: 1. Wash rice and soak for 30 mins. Meanwhile bring 5 to 6 cups water to a rolling boil in a large pot. Drain the water from the soaked rice and add it to the boiling water. If you want you can add half teaspoon salt and cook. 2. When the rice is cooked al dente (meaning the rice has a bite to it and not fully cooked), drain it to a colander. Do not over cook the rice. Cool completely. 3. Chop the veggies and garlic. Break the eggs to a bowl and beat until fluffy. 4. To be cooked on high flame. Heat a pan with oil, add chopped garlic & green chili. Fry for 30 seconds. Add spring onion whites and fry for a minute. 5. Add chopped veggies and fry for about 2 minutes. Do not make them mushy, they should be crunchy and half cooked. Slide the veggies to one side of the pan. 6. Reduce the flame to medium. Pour eggs and scramble them. Cook till they are soft, fluffy almost cooked but not overcooked. Sprinkle little salt. 7. Increase the heat and pour the soya sauce, vinegar and any hot sauce if you prefer. The soya hits the hot pan and emits some steam. This imparts a nice Chinese flavor. 8. Add cooled rice, ground black pepper and spring onion greens. If you want you may add some toasted sesame oil and it's optional. 9. Fry on the highest flame for about 2 minutes. Adjust salt and spice as needed. 10. Garnish egg fried rice with some spring onions and serve.

title: Egg Keema
ingredients: 4 boiled eggs, 2 tbsp oil, 1 bay leaf, 2 green cardamoms, 2 cloves 2 cloves, 1 cinnamon stick, 1 bay leaf, 0.5 tsp cumin, 0.75 cup onions, 1 green chili, 0.5 cup tomatoes, salt, 1 tsp ginger garlic paste, 0.5 tsp red chili powder, 0.875 tsp meat masala, 0.5 tsp garam masala, 0.5 tsp coriander powder, 0.5 cup green peas, 1 handful mint
instructions: 1. Boil 4 eggs in a pot. Remove the shell and cut them to small cubes without messing up the yolk much. Set aside. Heat oil and add cardamom, cinnamon, cloves, bay leaf and cumin. Saute until they begin to crackle. 2. Fry finely chopped onions until slightly golden. *note: finely chopped onions blend well with the keema. 3. Fry ginger garlic paste until the raw smell goes off. 4. Add chopped tomatoes and saute until they turn completely mushy. 5. Add turmeric, chili powder and garam masala or meat masala. I suggest adding coriander powder too if the masala has a very sharp taste. Saute until the raw smell of the red chili powder and tomatoes goes off. I used this homemade garam masala . 6. This step is optional. Green peas or soaked cashews can be used. Saute until the raw smell goes away. 7. Add very little water, salt, handful of pudina and coriander leaves. You can add kasuri methi instead of pudina. Cook until the water almost evaporates and a thick curry base is left. Check the salt if needed add more.

title: Egg Kurma (Egg Korma)
ingredients: 5 eggs, 2 tbsp oil, 0.75 cup onions, 1 green chili, 1 tsp ginger garlic paste, 1.25 cup tomatoes, salt, 1 pinch turmeric, 0.75 tsp red chili powder, 1.25 tsp garam masala, 1 tsp coriander powder, 2 tbsps mint leaves, 1 tbsp coriander leaves, 1 bay leaf, 3 cloves 3 cloves, 1 inch cinnamon piece, 2 green cardamom, 1 strand mace, 1 star anise, 0.5 tsp shahi jeera, 3 tbsp raw coconut, 8 cashews, 0.75 tsp fennel seeds
instructions: 1. Boil the eggs, remove the shells and make few incisions randomly and set aside. Heat oil in a pan, add cinnamon, star anise, cloves, jeera or shahi jeera and bay leaf. I used it along with the other spice powders later. Do not use too many spices if you are making this to go with a biryani, stick on to the quantity mentioned in the recipe. 2. When the spices begin to sizzle, add finely chopped onions and green chili. 3. Saute until the onions turn golden and add ginger garlic paste. Saute till the raw smell disappears. 4. Add chopped tomatoes, turmeric and salt. Saute until the tomatoes turn mushy. While the tomatoes cook, make a fine paste of raw coconut/yogurt, cashews & fennel seeds. If using coconut, add a splash of water to grind. Set the paste aside till we need it. 5. Add garam masala and chili powder. 6. Mix and saute until the masala smells aromatic. 7. Add the cashew paste. 8. Saute until it begins to smell good. This step takes about 3 to 5 minutes depending on the thickness of your paste. 9. Add mint and saute well for 2 to 3 mins. Pour water and mix well to make a gravy. Bring it to a rolling boil and simmer until thick. Add the boiled eggs. You can also fry the eggs in ghee at the beginning and add them to the pan now. Fried eggs do lend a nice flavor to the korma. 10. Simmer until you see traces of oil on top. Taste test and adjust salt or garam masala. If you want add little black pepper. Add coriander leaves and switch off. Serve Egg kurma with rice, roti, biryani, parotta and pulav.

title: Egg Masala Gravy Recipe
ingredients: 3 boiled eggs, 2 tbsp oil, 1.25 cup onions, 1.5 tsp ginger garlic paste, 0.75 cup tomatoes, 1.5 green chili, 0.625 tsp red chili powder, 0.875 tsp garam masala, 0.125 tsp turmeric, 0.5 tsp Salt, 0.5 tsp kasuri methi, 2 tbsp mint, 3 tbsp curd, 1 bay leaf, 0.5 tsp cumin, 3 cloves 3 cloves (or laung (optional)), 2 cardamoms, 1 inch cinnamon
instructions: 1. Pour 3 cups water to a pot. Gently place the rinsed eggs and boil on a medium heat. Cover the pot & boil until you see cracks on the eggs. Turn off the stove and rest the eggs for 10 mins. Discard the water & keep the eggs immersed in cold water to cool down. 2. Then remove the shell. Pierce with a fork randomly to make some gashes. This helps the eggs to absorb the flavors. 3. Heat a pan with oil. Add cumin, bay leaf, cloves, cardamoms and cinnamon. Allow them to splutter. 4. Add onions, sprinkle salt and fry till onions turn slightly brown or caramelize to enhance the aroma. 5. Optional step - Skip this step if using yogurt. While the onions fry, make a fine paste of the cashews or coconut with some water. You can also blend together tomatoes and cashews. 6. Add ginger garlic paste to the onions and saute till it becomes fragrant. 7. Next add tomatoes, fry till they turn mushy. 8. Add chili powder, turmeric and garam masala powder. Fry till it begins to smell good. 9. Pour the yogurt or cashew paste or coconut paste, fry till the mix leaves the sides of the pan. 10. Add eggs, mint leaves, coriander leaves. Fry for 2 mins , preferably till you get a mint aroma. 11. Pour water just enough to partially cover the eggs. Cook covered till the egg masala thickens. 12. Sprinkle some kasuri methi if you have. 13. Serve egg masala curry with rice, roti or paratha.

title: Egg Mayo Sandwich
ingredients: 4 slices Bread, 1 tablespoon butter, 3 Boiled eggs, 3.5 tablespoon mayonnaise, 0.875 tablespoon mustard, 0.25 teaspoon crushed black pepper, Salt, 2 tablespoons onion, 1 teaspoon Lemon juice, 0.625 teaspoon Red chill flakes, 1 garlic clove, 1 teaspoon herbs, 2.5 tablespoons parsley
instructions: 1. Boil eggs in pot or pressure cooker. Cool them and peel. I boil them in my instant pot for 7 minutes. Then let the pressure release naturally. I keep them in cold water for a while. Then peel them. 2. Chop the eggs to small bites without messing up the yolks much. 3. Add finely chopped onion, garlic, pepper, mustard powder or sauce, coriander or parsley and dried herbs if using. If you want to make your own mustard powder, just run a spoon full of seeds in a blender and make a fine powder. 4. Use about 1/8 tsp i.e 2 generous pinches. You can skip onions and garlic. You can also soak them in lemon juice for 20 mins and use. That helps to remove the pungent taste and flavor. 5. Add mayo as desired. You can use as much as you like. If you do not eat mayo then add cream cheese or Greek yogurt. 6. Mix everything well. Add red chilli flakes. You can add very little salt if needed since mayo is already salted. Taste this and add lemon juice if desired. 7. I prefer to toast the bread in preheated oven for 3 to 4 mins at 180 C. You can also toast on a griddle/ tawa or in a toaster. Spread the prepared egg mayo mixture on the bread. Serve egg mayo sandwich within 2 hours or chill in refrigerator until used. 8. Sandwich Recip... Vegetarian Club S... Veg Grilled Sandw... Yogurt Sandwich (... Tomato Cucumber S... Bombay Sandwich R...

title: Egg Pasta (Scrambled Egg Spaghetti)
ingredients: 2 grams spaghetti, 3 tablespoons olive oil, 2 tablespoons garlic, 1.25 tbsp red chilli flakes, 0.25 teaspoon sea salt, 3.5 eggs, 0.25 cup parsley
instructions: 1. Pour 10 cups of water to a large pot and bring it to a rolling boil. Add the pasta. 2. Add some salt. Cook until al dente. Check the package for cook time. Reserve ¼ cup pasta cooked water/stock aside. 3. Drain the cooked pasta to a colander. 4. While the pasta cooks, pour oil to a pan and heat up. Add chopped garlic. 5. Saute until the garlic begins to shrink. Do not wait until the garlic turns browns. When it turns aromatic, add red chili flakes. 6. Saute for about 30 to 50 seconds. Pour the pasta cooked stock, we reserved earlier and add salt. Note that we added salt while cooking pasta, so your reserved pasta stock has some salt. Add only as needed. Cook until the water evaporates and a slightly thick sauce like mixture is left. 7. Pour the eggs. 8. Scramble them and cook until the eggs are fully cooked and set, yet soft. Taste test and add salt to your preference. 9. Add the drained pasta. 10. Toss well with the eggs and add chopped parsley or your favorite herbs. Serve egg pasta hot.

title: Egg Roast (Spicy Roasted Eggs)
ingredients: 4 Boiled Eggs, 2 tablespoons oil, 0.5 teaspoon Mustard Seeds, 0.5 teaspoon Fennel Seeds, 2 cups onions, 1 teaspoon Ginger, 1 teaspoon Garlic, 1 sprig Curry Leaves, 0.25 teaspoon Turmeric Powder, 0.875 teaspoon Red Chili Powder, 0.375 teaspoon Black Pepper Powder, 1 teaspoon Garam Masala, 2 teaspoons Coriander Powder, 1 medium Tomato, 0.25 cup water, 0.5 teaspoon salt
instructions: 1. Once it starts boiling, lower the heat and allow it to simmer for another 10 minutes. When the time is up, remove pan from the heat and set it aside for 5 to 10 minutes, if time permits. Now, drain the water and deshell the eggs. Make slits or poke holes on it randomly. 2. Next, heat 2 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Tip: If you have a cast-iron skillet, that would be perfect for making this egg roast as it lends a darker color to the gravy. 3. Once the oil is hot, stir in the ½ tsp. mustard and ½ tsp crushed fennel seeds. When they start to crackle, add the 4 finely chopped onions. Lower the heat to medium. 4. Sauté them until golden. Spoon in 1 tsp. of both crushed ginger and garlic to it along with a bit more of oil if required and salt. Tip: Adding salt helps to sweat the onions. You may add about ½ tsp. of salt at this point. Continue cooking on a low to medium heat, until the mixture has browned lightly but not burnt. 5. After that, reduce the heat to low. Add ¼ tsp. of turmeric powder, ¾ to 1 tsp. red chili powder, ¼ tsp. black pepper powder, 1 tsp. Garam Masala and 2 tsp. of coriander powder to it. 6. Give the spicy onion mix a good stir.. Once the spices have no lingering smell, add the 1 finely chopped tomato and stir well. At this point, the oil would be well absorbed by the spices, and the mix will be dry. 7. Cook for another 5 to 10 minutes or until the tomatoes have broken down and the gravy has absorbed the masala’s flavors. 8. Add ¼ cup of hot water and bring the whole mixture to a boil. Cook until the water evaporates. 9. Finally, add the 4 boiled eggs and a few sprigs of curry leaves. Keep stirring and roast the eggs until the whole mixture has caramelized and turns darker. The longer you roast the better the flavors are. It takes about 7 to 10 mins for the egg roast to reach that stage. Taste test and add salt if required at this stage. 10. Tip: If you prefer, you can mash one egg yolk to it for a thicker consistency. Set it aside for ten minutes for the flavors to meld. Roast until the oil starts to separate from it. Garnish with coriander leaves, if preferred. Serve it hot.

title: Egg Toast Recipe
ingredients: 3 slices bread, 2 eggs, 1 tablespoon oil, 0.25 salt, 3 tablespoons onion, 3 tablespoons tomato, 1 green chili, 1.5 tablespoon coriander leaves, 1 pinch turmeric, 1 pinch chili flakes
instructions: 1. Break the eggs to a mixing bowl and whisk them well with a fork. 2. Add chopped onions, chilies, tomatoes & coriander leaves. Sprinkle, turmeric, salt and chili flakes over the dry ingredients. Whisk well until frothy. 3. Heat a pan with oil or butter on a medium heat and spread it well. 4. Dip a bread slice in the egg mixture to coat on both the sides. Place it over the hot pan. You can cook 2 to 3 slices at one time depending on the size of your bread and pan. (check video) 5. Pour 2 tablespoons of egg mixture on top of each bread slice and let cook until the base is firm. 6. Turn the bread slices to the other side and cook, pressing down with a spatula. If you are left with a little more egg mixture & don't want to use more bread, you may pour 2 tablespoons of the mixture on each (already cooked toast) and cook further. 7. Serve Egg Toast hot or warm. 8. Preheat the oven to 380 F or 160 C for at least 15 mins. Spread butter on one side of your bread and place them over a baking tray with the buttered side up. 9. Gently pour a few tablespoons of the egg mixture over the bread slices. 10. Place the tray in the middle rack and bake for 14 mins or until the eggs are thoroughly cooked through.

title: Eggless Apple Cake
ingredients: 1 cup all-purpose flour, 2 medium apples, 0.5 cup sugar, 0.25 tsp baking soda, 1 tsp baking powder, 0.125 tsp cinnamon powder, 0.3333333333333333 cup butter, 0.5 cup milk, 0.75 tbsp vinegar
instructions: 1. Wash the apples. I used 2 medium sized apples. Do not use very sour apples as it makes the cake sour. 2. Peel and cube them. Add them to a blender. 3. Make a smooth puree. 4. Pour milk to a mixing bowl. Do not use chilled milk. Add sugar. 5. Measure and use only half cup of the apple puree. I was left with just another 2 to 3 tbsp of the puree which I stirred in my black tea and strained. 6. Melt butter and use only 1/3 cup. 7. Pour ¾ tbsp vinegar or lemon juice to activate the soda. I used apple cider vinegar. I also added 1 tsp vanilla extract which you can omit, as the cinnamon powder we are using is good enough to flavor the cake. 8. Give all these a good mix. It is just fine even if the sugar doesn’t dissolve. 9. Place a sieve over the mixing bowl. Add flour, cinnamon, baking powder, baking soda and a pinch of salt if desired. Please be sure that you measure baking powder & soda correctly without interchanging one for the other. 10. Give a good stir. 11. Sieve and begin to incorporate the dry ingredients with the wet. Use a whisk if you are a beginner. 12. Do not over mix. Just mix until both are well combined. 13. Pour to the cake pan. Tap the pan to the counter 2 to 3 times. 14. Bake at 340 F – 170 C for 26 to 30 mins. A cake tester inserted comes out clean or with slight crumbs. Leave the cake pan on the wired rack for 5 to 7 mins. 15. Then invert it and cool completely. Slice eggless apple cake only after it has cooled completely. I sprinkled some powdered sugar. 16. Eggless Chocolate... Eggless chocolate... Cake Recipe witho... Eggless Christmas... Cooker Cake, How ... Banana Cake Recip...

title: Eggless Banana Bread
ingredients: 24 grams wheat flour, 0.75 teaspoon baking soda, 0.75 teaspoon baking powder, 0.5 teaspoon salt, 0.5 teaspoon cinnamon powder, 0.3333333333333333 cup oil, 0.875 cup sugar, 1.5 cups banana, 0.25 cup water, 1 tablespoon vinegar, 0.5 tablespoon vanilla extract, 0.375 cup walnuts
instructions: 1. Grease a loaf pan (8 ½ x 4 ½ inches) and set aside. Make sure all the ingredients are at room temperature before you proceed. 2. Preheat the oven to 340 F or 170 C for at least 15 minutes. 3. While the oven heats, begin to make the batter. Into a large mixing bowl, add bananas and mash them very well. 4. Add sugar and pour water. Whisk well to dissolve the sugar completely. 5. Then pour oil, vinegar and vanilla extract. Whisk and set this bowl aside. 6. Place a sieve oven another large bowl, add flour, salt, baking soda and cinnamon. Baking powder is optional and can be added for a lighter banana bread. 7. Sieve all of them well. 8. Whisk the liquid ingredients once more and add ½ of the sieved flour. Incorporate the flour and then add the second rest of the flour. Fold it until just combined. 9. If using wheat flour, add 2 tbsps more water. Mix the batter ensuring you don’t overmix it. 10. Transfer the batter to the greased loaf pan. Tap the pan to the kichen counter a few times. Then sprinkle chopped nuts. 11. Bake it for 60 to 63 minutes until a tester inserted in the center of the pan comes out clean. You may need to bake a little longer as it depends on the oven. 12. Place the pan on a wired rack and cool for 10 minutes. Then invert eggless banana bread on the rack and cool it completely before slicing.

title: Eggless Banana Muffins Recipe
ingredients: 1 cup mashed bananas, 0.5 cup sugar, 0.25 cup 2 tablespoons cup water, 0.5 cup melted butter, 2 teaspoons lemon juice, 2 cups all-purpose flour, 0.5 teaspoon salt, 0.5 teaspoon baking soda, 1 teaspoon Vanilla extract, 0.5 teaspoon cinnamon, 0.375 cup mini choco chips
instructions: 1. Preheat the oven to 180 C or 350 F for at least 15 to 20 mins. If using an OTG, heat it with both (top & bottom) heating elements ON. 2. Place muffin liners in a muffin tray. 3. Mash ripe bananas very well with a masher or a fork. 4. Add it to a mixing bowl along with sugar and water. Mix until sugar dissolves completely. 5. Pour melted butter or oil, vanilla and lemon juice. Stir everything well. 6. Place a sieve over the mixing bowl. Add flour, baking soda, salt and cinnamon to the sieve. Mix gently with a spoon. 7. Sieve half of the flour to the liquid ingredients. 8. Gently mix and sieve the rest of the flour. 9. Mix everything well until just combined. Do not over mix the batter. This will make the muffins tough. For consistency of the batter, take a look at the video or step-by-step pictures. 10. Scoop off small amounts of batter with a ladle or a ice cream scoop to all the liners. 11. Top them with choco chips or chopped walnuts. 12. Place the muffin tray in the middle rack. 13. Bake them exactly for 20 mins or until a tester inserted comes out clean or with tiny crumbs. Baking time may vary depending on your oven. You may need to bake a little longer. 14. When they are completely baked, a tester inserted in the center of a muffin comes out clean. If you see the inside is under baked, bake them a little longer. 15. Cool eggless banana muffins on a wire rack and serve warm with milk or tea.

title: Eggless Banana Pancakes
ingredients: 1 cup flour, 1.5 tsp baking powder, 2 tsps sugar, 2 pinches salt, 0.125 tsp cinnamon, 1 tsp vanilla extract, 1 banana, 2 tsp oil, 0.75 cup milk, Butter
instructions: 1. These are the ingredients I have used in this recipe. I often get queries from readers asking about the brand or the kind of ingredients I used. So sharing this pic. You can use plain water or milk. To make the vegan milk, you can use either coconut or about 10 cashews. I used about 1/4 cup of frozen grated coconut, 3/4 cup water and extracted the milk by blending in a Mini blender. 2. Add flour, baking powder and salt to a bowl. 3. Mix them very well and set aside. 4. Add banana, sugar and cinnamon powder. Do not use cassia, choose only true cinnamon. If you do not have skip it. 5. Add vanilla and oil or melted butter. I used virgin coconut oil. 6. Added the coconut milk by filtering it. Measure the milk and add it. You can also substitute with plain water. 7. Mix everything well. Break up any banana chunks. 8. Add half of the flour and mix. Add the other half and mix until just combined. 9. Very soon in few minutes, you will begin to see tinny bubbles. Baking powder begins to get activated. You will have to use up the batter right away for fluffy and well cooked pancakes. The consistency of the batter is thick but of pouring consistency like idli batter. You can check the next picture to get an idea of the right consistency. You can also add little more water or milk if needed.

title: Eggless Black Forest Cake
ingredients: 1.5 cups flour, 0.25 cup cocoa, 1 tsp baking soda, 0.25 tsp salt, 1 cup sugar, 1 cup milk, 0.3333333333333333 cup oil, 1 tbsp vanilla extract, 1 tbsp vinegar, 0.625 cup cherries, 2 tbsp sugar, 4.5 tbsp water, 1.5 cups whipping cream, 3 tbsp powdered sugar, 7 cherries, 1 chocolate bar
instructions: 1. Grease & line two 6 inch cake pans or one 8 inch pan. Preheat the oven to 170 C for at least 15 mins. 2. Sieve together flour, salt, cocoa and baking soda to a mixing bowl. Mix up the sugar and make a well in the center. 3. Pour oil, vinegar, vanilla and milk or water. Mix well until just combined and is free of lumps. 4. Pour the batter to the cake pans and knock to the kitchen counter a few times. 5. Bake the cake for - 20 mins if using two 6 inch pans. Bake for - 30 to 35 mins if using one 8 inch pan. When done tester inserted comes out clean. 6. Cool the cake pan on a wire rack for 8 to 10 mins. Invert it on the rack and cool completely before frosting. 7. If using sugar syrup boil 2 tbsps of sugar in 4 to 5 tbsps of water until the sugar dissolves and comes to a rolling boil. 8. Or add 3 tbsps water to chopped cherries and set aside for 45 to 50 mins. 9. Strain the cherries and collect the syrup. 10. Pat the cherries gently to remove excess juices. 11. Keep the chocolate at room temperature for a while until it is easy to handle. 12. Shave the chocolate bar using a fruit peeler. Keep it in the fridge until used. 13. Chill a bowl & beaters for at least 2 hours to whip the cream. I also chill the cake for an hour. 14. If made to a single 8 inch cake then cut it to 2 layers. I do not prefer to slice the cake so I bake in two 6 inch pans. 15. Pour some cherry syrup or sugar syrup on each layer of the cake. Set this aside. 16. Pour the whipping cream to the chilled bowl and begin to whip on a low speed then on medium speed until bubbly and slightly thick. 17. Then add the powdered sugar and vanilla. Whip until stiff peaks. 18. Fit a pipping nozzle inside a piping bag or use a disposable plastic bag. 19. Transfer half cup of whipped cream to the bag. Refrigerate until used. 20. Do not handle the bag a lot else the cream will soften. 21. Spread 1 tbsp whipped cream on the cake stand and place a cake layer over it. 22. Then begin to spread some frosting over it. Spread chopped cherries over the cream. 23. Next place another layer of cake and spread the frosting. 24. Finish up on the top portion and sides as well. 25. Refrigerate the cream and the cake too for 45 to 50 mins if the cream begins to turn soft. 26. Lastly spread a generous amount of whipped cream to finish off. 27. Cover the sides of the cake with the chocolate shavings. 28. Then decorate the cake border using the piping bag. 29. I made about 12 roses you can do as many as you like - big or small. You can make your own designs too. 30. Place the chilled whole cherries on the roses and then fill up the gaps with chocolate shavings. 31. Refrigerate the eggless black forest cake until needed.

title: Eggless Carrot Cake Recipe
ingredients: 1 cup 2 tablespoons all-purpose flour, 0.75 teaspoon baking soda, 0.75 teaspoon baking powder, 1 pinch salt, 0.375 teaspoon cinnamon powder, 1 pinch nutmeg powder, 4 tablespoons oil, 0.5 cup 2 tablespoons sugar, 0.25 cup 2 tablespoons milk, 1 tablespoon vinegar, 1 teaspoon vanilla extract, 0.75 cup carrot, 0.5 cup cream cheese, 1 tablespoon butter, 3.5 tablespoon sugar, 1 teaspoon vanilla extract, 2 tablespoon nuts
instructions: 1. Grease a 6 inch pan and line it. Preheat the oven to 340 F or 170 C for at least 15 mins. 2. Mix together milk, vinegar, sugar, vanilla & oil. Stir well until uniform & sugar dissolves completely. 3. Fluff up the flour in the jar/pack first and then spoon it to the measuring cup. Then level it. 4. Sieve together flour, baking soda, baking powder, cinnamon, nutmeg & salt. Mix well. 5. Stir the milk mixture well and pour to the dry ingredients. Mix until just combined. Ensure there are no lumps. 6. Add the grated carrots & mix gently until just combined. 7. Tap the cake pan twice to the kitchen counter and bake for 28 to 30 mins. 8. When the cake is done, tester inserted comes out clean. 9. Cool the cake pan on the cooling rack for 10 mins. Invert on a cooling rack. Cool completely before slicing. 10. You can use brick cream cheese for frosting or make your own at home. 11. I boiled about 4 cups milk & curdled it using some lemon juice. 12. Then drained to a muslin cloth. 13. Made a knot & hung it for 2 hours to drain the whey completely. 14. Then pulsed it in a processor until smooth. Use it as cream cheese for frosting. 15. Add the cheese and butter to a mixing bowl. Whisk it well until smooth. 16. Then add powdered sugar and beat until smooth, light, fluffy & creamy. 17. It should be thick & of spreading consistency. 18. You can add more sugar to suit your taste. 19. If the frosting is too thick drizzle 1 tbsp milk or little powdered sugar and beat for a while. 20. Transfer the frosting to the cake and spread it. Sprinkle some chopped nuts. 21. Slice the eggless carrot cake and serve.

title: Eggless chocolate banana cake recipe | chocolate banana cake no eggs
ingredients: 2 cups flour, 1.5 cup sugar, 0.6666666666666666 cup cocoa powder, 1.5 tsp baking soda, 1.5 tbsp vinegar, 1 tbsp vanilla extract, 1.5 cup water, 0.25 cup Oil, 1 cup banana puree
instructions: 1. Preheat the oven at 160 C. Grease the baking tray and lightly sprinkle flour evenly. You can also line a parchment paper. Set aside. 2. Sieve together flour, cocoa & baking soda. You can use whole wheat flour / atta or half atta and half maida or even whole wheat pastry flour works good. 3. Sieve this mixture thrice. This helps to make the cake lighter. Set aside. 4. Add sugar / jaggery or palm sugar to a mixing bowl. Add water. If using jaggery, i suggest mixing well and filtering to remove debris. I have earlier tried this with palm sugar and jaggery, it works very well. 5. Add 1 & 1/2 tbsps vinegar. 6. Add 1 tsp to 1 tbsp vanilla. 7. Add ¼ cup oil or softened unsalted butter. You can use any neutral oil like sunflower or canola or any baking oils. 8. Add 1 cup banana puree. I blended 3 medium sized bananas and got 1 cup puree. 9. Mix everything well. 10. Add the flour to the liquid in 2 equal parts. 11. Mix well but do not over mix. Make sure there are no lumps. You will see it begins to react immediately. 12. Add it to the greased pan. Tap it a few times on the kitchen counter to remove air bubbles. Bake at 160 C for 45 to 50 mins. I suggest checking after 40 mins since oven temperatures can vary slightly. When done completely, a skewer inserted must come out clean. 13. Wait to cool down for 5 to 7 mins. 14. Flip it on a wired rack. Cool it completely. This banana cake tastes the best the next day. 15. If you like to frost, cool it completely and frost. This cake does not need frosting unless you like your cake to be very chocolaty. I made a chocolate icing using 2.5 tbsp cocoa, 1 cup milk, 1 tsp vanilla 2 tsps unsalted butter and 2 to 3 tbsps sugar. 16. Mix together milk, cocoa and sugar. Make sure there are no lumps before you begin to cook. 17. Cook stirring continuously on a medium heat until the mixture thickens and coats the back of the spoon well. Add butter and vanilla. Stir well and cook for 2 mins. 18. Cool completely and pour it on the cake. You will have to cut parchment paper to 4 wide strips and place under the edges of the cake on all the 4 sides to collect any drippings. The mixture will be thick like frosting, you will have to spread it evenly using a frosting spatula. I scrapped off some white chocolate and sprinkled on top.

title: Eggless Chocolate Cake Recipe
ingredients: 1.5 cups all-purpose flour, 0.25 cup cocoa powder, 1 teaspoon Baking soda, 0.3333333333333333 teaspoon salt, 1 cup sugar, 1 cup Water, 0.3333333333333333 cup oil, 1 tablespoon white vinegar, 1 tablespoon Vanilla extract, 0.75 cup milk, 2 tablespoons cocoa powder, 5 tablespoon sugar, 1 teaspoon vanilla extract, 0.25 cup unsalted butter, 3 tablespoons cocoa powder, 1.5 cups powdered sugar, 1 teaspoon vanilla extract, 2.25 tablespoons milk
instructions: 1. Preheat the oven to 180 C or 350 F for at least 15 mins. 2. Grease a 8 or 9 inch round cake pan & drizzle some flour on it. or Line with a parchment paper. Set aside. 3. Mix together flour, cocoa powder, salt and baking soda. 4. Sieve this mix at least twice to aerate the flour. This makes the cake light. If using wheat flour then sieve four times. 5. Add sugar and mix it well. I use fine sugar. If you are using coarse one then you can also dissolve it in 1 cup water (called for the recipe) and pour it in the next step. 6. Make a well (space) in the center. Pour water, oil or melted butter, vanilla extract and vinegar called for in the cake ingredients. 7. Gently begin to mix well from the liquid ingredients in the center. 8. Using a whisk or spatula, mix just until the flour is combined well with the wet ingredients. Do not over mix. 9. The batter will be runny. Pour it to the cake pan. 10. Knock it a few times against the kitchen counter to release air bubbles. 11. Bake for 30 to 35 mins. Check after 27 mins. The bake time may vary depending on your pan size and oven. So Just bake it until a skewer or a tester inserted comes out clean. 12. To check if it is completely baked, insert a skewer in the center of the cake and check. It must come out clean. 13. Keep the cake pan on a wire rack and allow it to cool down for 8 to 10 mins in the pan. 14. Invert eggless chocolate cake gently on a wire rack. Allow it to cool. 15. You can frost the cake if you like or just sprinkle some powdered sugar. 16. This eggless chocolate cake tastes best the next day. 17. Mix together ¾ cup milk, 2 tbsps cocoa, 1 tsp vanilla extract & 4 to 6 tbsps sugar. 18. The mixture must be lump free & smooth. 19. Begin to cook on a low to medium heat stirring constantly until slightly thick & creamy. 20. Taste it and add more sugar if needed & boil. Cool completely. 21. Place the cake on a plate or a tray that can hold the excess dripping from chocolate sauce. 22. Pour the chocolate frosting on the warm eggless chocolate cake. 23. Spread with spatula. For step by step pics, please refer this Ragi cake. 24. Ensure the butter is soft yet cold. When you press down the block of butter, it must dent easily yet hold shape without melting. 25. Add butter to a large bowl and beat it until soft and fluffy. You can use a hand mixer or just a whisk. 26. Place a sieve over the butter bowl. Add cocoa and powdered sugar to the sieve. Sieve it well. 27. Pour vanilla and 2 tbsps milk or cream. Mix them up lightly. 28. Then whisk or beat until everything turns smooth fluffy and light. It must be of spreadable consistency. 29. If it is too thick, then add another half to 1 tbsp milk or cream. Beat well until it reaches a good consistency. 30. Do not over beat else the butter begins to melt. 31. If needed you can keep it in the fridge for a while. 32. Spread a tbsp of frosting on your cake stand. Place 4 - 2 by 8 inch parchment paper strips across the four sides of the cake stand. 33. Place the cake over these papers with the frosting beneath the cake. 34. Scoop off a good amount of frosting to the cake. Begin to spread from the center and then towards the sides. 35. Place the cake in the fridge for about 40 mins. Then smoothen the cake with a spatula. Remove the parchment papers gently. 36. Eggless chocolate cake is ready. Slice & serve.

title: Eggless Chocolate Chip Cookies
ingredients: 0.5 cup 1 tablespoon organic all-purpose flour, 0.25 teaspoon baking soda, 1 pinch salt, 2 tablespoons granulated sugar, 2 tablespoons light brown sugar, 0.25 cup unsalted butter, 0.25 teaspoon vanilla extract, 0.25 cup semi-sweet chocolate chips, 1 tablespoon milk
instructions: 1. In a mixing bowl, mix together flour, baking soda and salt until well combined. Set aside. 2. To another bowl, add in softened butter. It must be soft but cold and when pressed down with a finger it must dent. It must also hold shape and remain in solid state. 3. Whisk it just for 30 seconds. Then add light brown sugar and regular sugar. Cream until light and fluffy for about 1 to 2 mins. Do not over work, else butter begins to melt. 4. Add in vanilla and mix. 5. Now add the flour to the creamed butter and sugar. Mix well just until combined to form a non sticky dough, adding milk only if required. 6. Add the chocolate chips and mix gently. Cover and chill the dough in refrigerator for 25 to 30 mins. 7. Meanwhile preheat the oven to 180 C or 350 F for at least 15 mins. 8. Divide the dough to 9 portions and shape them to balls. Place them on a tray lined with parchment paper. Optionally, tuck in 2 to 3 choco chips to each of the dough balls. 9. Bake for 12 mins, until the edges turn firm and begin to look brown. The cookies will be slightly soft in the center but will firm up after cooling. They will still bake on the tray after removing from the oven. Every oven is different so, you may need to bake a little longer depending on the oven. If using a OTG, bake for 8 to 9 mins. 10. Let cool in the tray, placed over a wire rack for 5 mins. Later cool down completely on a wire rack. 11. Store them in a air tight jar and use up within 7 days.

title: Eggless Cupcakes
ingredients: 0.75 cup all-purpose flour, 0.5 teaspoon baking powder, 0.25 teaspoon baking soda, 1 tiny pinch salt, 6 tablespoons sugar, 3.5 tablespoons melted butter, 0.5 cup milk, 0.75 tablespoon vinegar, 1 teaspoon vanilla extract, 0.75 cup all-purpose flour, 2 tablespoons cocoa powder, 0.5 teaspoon baking soda, 0.25 teaspoon salt, 0.5 cup sugar, 0.5 cup water, 4 ml oil, 0.5 tablespoon vinegar, 0.5 tablespoon vanilla extract, 0.5 cup unsalted butter, 1.5 cups confectioners sugar, 1 teaspoon vanilla extract, 1 tablespoon milk, 0.25 cup unsalted butter, 4 tablespoons cocoa powder, 1.5 cups powdered sugar, 1 teaspoon vanilla extract, 1.5 tablespoons milk
instructions: 1. Place the cupcake liners in a muffin tray or ramekins. 2. Preheat the oven to 170 C or 340 F for atleast 15 mins. 3. Place a sieve over a bowl and sieve flour, baking powder, baking soda and salt. Give a good stir. 4. In another large bowl, mix together milk, melted butter, sugar, vanilla and vinegar. 5. Then add ½ of the flour mixture to the prepared wet mixture and mix with a whisk just until combined. 6. Next add the rest of the flour and gently mix until combined. 7. Scoop the batter equally using a small cup or ice cream scooper to 6 cupcake liners. 8. Bake them in the center of the oven for 13 to 15 mins. Please adjust the baking time as it differs from each oven. When done a tester or a skewer inserted comes out clean. 9. Cool them completely before frosting. 10. Sieve together flour, cocoa, salt & baking soda. Mix with a spoon and set aside. 11. In another large mixing bowl, stir together sugar, water, oil, vanilla and vinegar. 12. Add half of the flour mixture to the wet mixture and mix with a whisk just until combined. 13. Then add the rest of the flour and mix until just combined. Avoid over mixing. 14. Divide the batter to 6 cupcake liners using a small cup or a ice cream scooper. 15. Bake the cupcakes for 14 o 15 mins or until a skewer inserted comes out clean. Adjust the bake time if needed. 16. Cool them completely on a wire rack before frosting. 17. Ensure the butter is soft yet cold. Beat it with a paddle attachment in a stand mixer on a medium speed until light, smooth and fluffy. This takes about 3 to 4 minutes depending on the quantity. 18. Add vanilla and half of the powdered sugar. Mix on a medium speed and then add the other half of the powdered sugar. 19. Continue to beat on a medium high speed until light and fluffy. If the frosting is too thick sprinkle 1 tsp to tbsp milk. 20. If making chocolate buttercream, add in the cocoa and (optional) 1 tsp to 1 tbsp milk. Beat on a medium high speed until light and fluffy. If the frosting is too thick, add another tsp of milk and beat. 21. The prepared buttercream frosting must be light, smooth and fluffy. (refer pictures below) 22. Trim off a small portion of the piping bag to fit in a noozle from inside. Fill the bag only half way. Frost the eggless cupcakes as desired.

title: Eggless Sponge Cake
ingredients: 1.5 cups all-purpose flour, 0.75 cup sugar, 1.25 tsp baking powder, 0.5 tsp baking soda, 0.5 cup oil, 1 cup curd, 2.5 tbsps milk, 0.875 tbsp vanilla extract, 0.6666666666666666 cup choco chips, 0.25 cup milk, 0.75 tbsp vanilla extract
instructions: 1. Grease a 7 or 8 inch cake tray and line it with parchment paper. Preheat the oven to 340 F – 170 C for at least 15 mins. Add curd to a mixing bowl. I use fresh homemade curd made using full fat milk. It is of semi solid consistency, not very thick nor runny and isn’t sour. 2. Add sugar and vanilla extract. I use organic sugar. 3. Mix very well until the sugar dissolves completely. 4. Pour oil and mix until the mixture is smooth and uniform. Make sure there are no lumps of curd. 5. Add baking powder. 6. Add baking soda. 7. Mix well gently. The soda begins to react with the curd. The mixture turns thick and frothy. 8. Place a sieve over the bowl. Add the flour in 2 to 3 parts. First add ½ to ¾ cup of the flour. 9. Mix gently just until combined with a whisk or spatula to your convenience. 10. Do not over mix. 11. Add the rest of the flour and sieve. 12. Begin to mix gently. 13. The batter will be thick at this stage. 14. Add in 2 to 3 tbsps of milk. 15. Mix gently. The batter is of a ribbon consistency. If the batter is thicker than this the cake may turn out dense. 16. Transfer to a greased and lined cake tray. Brush the top with some milk. This helps the cake top to turn golden and prevents drying up. Knock the tray to the counter few times. 17. Bake it for 25 to 30 mins. Mine was done at 30 mins. The timing may vary depending on your oven and the size of your cake pan. When the cake is done, a skewer or a tester inserted in the center comes out clean. 18. Cool the cake for about 10 to 15 mins on a wire rack, to prevent sweating at the bottom. Invert it on a wire rack gently. 19. Remove the parchment papers and cool the cake completely. 20. I went ahead melting some semi sweet choco chips. You can also use any other chocolate. I used about 2/3 cup of semi-sweet choco chips with ¼ cup of milk. I did not use sugar. The sweetness from the choco chips was good enough. 21. Microwaved it for 2 mins at 700 W. Stir well with a spoon until smooth. I also added ¾ tbsp. vanilla extract. 22. Cool the melted chocolate and the cake as well. Spread a generous amount of it with a spatula. 23. I made 2 cakes. So I placed another one over it. 24. Spread more melted chocolate as desired. 25. Smoothen with the spatula. IYou can keep the cake in fridge for 15 to 20 mins to get a smooth finishing. Slice the eggless sponge cake and serve. 26. Preparation: Grease a 7 or 8 inch cake tray. Line a parchment paper or dust with flour. Preheat the oven to 340 F – 170 C for at least 15 mins. 27. Mix the wet ingredients: In a large mixing bowl, stir together fresh curd, sugar and vanilla extract, until sugar has dissolved completely. Make sure there are no lumps of curd. Pour oil and mix well until combined. 28. Activate the leavening agent: Whisk baking powder and baking soda with the wet ingredients, until the mixture turns thick and frothy. (for about a minute) 29. Make the batter: Place a sieve over the bowl. Add ½ to ¾ cup of flour to the sieve. Sieve it well. Mix gently until just combined. Place the sieve back on the bowl. Add the rest of the flour in 1 to 2 parts. Sieve and gently mix until there are no streaks of flour seen. 30. Transfer to pan: The batter will be slightly thick. Add 2 to 3 tbsps. of milk and mix in. The batter at this stage is of the ribbon consistency. Pour this to the cake tray. Brush lightly with milk on top to get a beautiful golden color. Gently knock the pan to the counter a few times. 31. Bake the cake: Bake for 25 to 30 mins. Do adjust the time depending on your oven and the size of your pan. It took exactly 30 mins for me in a 7 inch square pan. When the cake is done, a tester inserted comes out clean. Cool the cake for 10 to 15 mins in the pan, placed over a wire rack. 32. Melt chocolate: Melt the choco chips together with milk in a microwave for 1 to 2 mins. Stir well until the mixture turns smooth and is of spreading consistency. Cool down completely and spread over the cake. If you want you may chill for 15 mins. 33. Slice eggless sponge cake and serve. 34. .kadence-column173268_d8ec65-ba > .kt-inside-inner-col,.kadence-column173268_d8ec65-ba >
